flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Portland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Portland Community College rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 (9.6% → 12.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Portland Community College fell 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.7k → $13.0k).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Portland Community College are 14% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($44.6k vs $39.2k).
